title: The Vending Machine Travels
overview: After his untimely death, our unlikely hero finds himself in another world, reincarnated as a vending machine. Now his life revolves around selling things to people, but he's stuck in the middle of nowhere with no sign of any customers.

title: The King Frog Fiend Appears
overview: The Hunters Association hires Lammis and Boxxo to provide food during a frog fiend hunt, with a ragtag group acting as their bodyguards. But things turn ominous when the fiends prove to be more numerous than expected.

title: Rebuilding
overview: The expedition returns to find the village has been attacked, but fortunately the damage is limited. Boxxo and Lammis discover they both have plenty of ways to help during the recovery effort.

title: Boxxo Is Abducted
overview: A gang of thieves carts Boxxo away so they can extract his money, but the real surprise turns out to be the individual who's supposed to figure out how to pull off the theft.

title: Vanity, Pride, and Vending Machine
overview: Boxxo is already well known throughout the village for the items he's sold to date, and now he begins to find new ways to assist various residents with their problems.

title: The Fighting Vending Machine
overview: Boxxo falls into a new stratum, and there he has an unexpected encounter with some hungry hunters who think he's nothing more than a convenient magic item.

title: The Voracious Devils
overview: Boxxo falls into a new stratum, and there he has an unexpected encounter with some hungry hunters who think he's nothing more than a convenient magic item.

title: The Flame Skeletitan of the Labyrinth Stratum
overview: Boxxo, Lammis, and a large formidable group go on a campaign in the Labyrinth stratum to defeat the local stratum lord. Meanwhile, Kerioyl reveals his reasons for targeting such foes in the first place.

title: A Less-Than-Ideal Hero
overview: Director Bear commissions Boxxo, Lammis, Hulemy, and the Band of Gluttons to survey the exterior of the labyrinth. Joining them is a powerful hunter who has more going on than meets the eye.

title: Gastric Measures
overview: Munami and the Restaurant Union decide to hold an eating contest, but that's a risky venture given the appetites of some of the locals. Can Boxxo save the day once again?

title: The Dead's Lament Stratum
overview: Captain Kerioyl wants a group to explore the Dead's Lament stratum and eventually defeat its stratum lord, but there's a big problem. Lammis can't cope with the scary monsters inhabiting the place!

title: What Can Be Done as a Vending Machine
overview: Boxxo and friends track down the King of Souls stratum lord and launch an attack on him. But they face their greatest trial yet when the plan goes badly off the rails.

title: Hunters and Motives
overview: A large group of ace hunters gather to the Dead's Lament stratum to take down the Netherlord once and for all.

title: Mutual Understanding
overview: Boxxo and crew have to defend what's left of the Clearflow Lake stratum's village against a horde of monsters.

title: Strong Feelings
overview: To get rid of the monsters in Clearflow Lake stratum, first the hole in the defensive wall needs to be filled.

title: The Clergyman and the Vending Machine
overview: A small group including Boxxo goes to the Origin stratum to help fight off the attacking monster horde there.

title: Respective Wishes
overview: In order to securely evacuate the Origin stratum, the enemy commander must first be found and neutralized.

title: Sweet Temptation
overview: Kerioyl reveals many surprises when Boxxo and friends pay their first visit to the Menagerie of Fools' base.

title: The Animals and the Girl
overview: While searching for magic stones, Boxxo and Director Bear stumble upon an unusual trio inside the labyrinth.

title: The Dark Forest Stratum
overview: Boxxo and friends end up in the Dark Forest stratum, where they must help the locals with some problems.

title: Conflagration
overview: The lord of the Dark Forest stratum needs to be defeated, but nothing seems to provoke it into attacking.

title: The Dungeon Goddess Grand Prix
overview: To help boost morale, Munami holds a popularity contest amongst the ladies living in Clearflow Lake stratum.

title: Into the Scorching Desert
overview: When Hevee departs for the Scorching Sand stratum to deal with a personal matter, the other heroes follow him.

title: Blizzard in the Desert
overview: While Hevee sorts out his unfinished business with Tashtay, some unexpected foes arrive to complicate matters.

title: Each to Their Own Story
overview: Boxxo and Kikoyu celebrate birthdays, and the party ventures to the Dog Mountain stratum.

title: The Clam and the Vending Machine
overview: Boxxo's crew reach Pity's island, where old and new enemies await them.

title: A Stay in Enemy Territory
overview: Boxxo and Pity seek a way to escape from the Netherlord's base.

title: The Troubles Will Continue Forever
overview: The situation gets hairy at the Dog Mountain stratum, and Boxxo attempts to help Gorth with his love life.

title: Another Uproar
overview: Plans to tackle the Everlasting stratum are put on hold when a large horde of monsters attacks the village.
